fi.announcement.message: Version 2.0 is live with faster loading times!
fi.map.instructions: Click a station to change the selected workspace. The highlighted route shows the current cycle.
fi.map.linesDescription: Lines show decision tracks across the shared APIOps backbone. Cycles show the journey for a goal.
fi.map.instructionsSvg: Click any station dot to navigate. Use the cycle selector to switch route.
fi.station.noLineTransitions: No line transitions are listed for this station.
fi.resources.emptyCanvases: No canvas resources are directly linked to this station.
fi.resources.emptyOther: No additional resources are directly linked to this station.
fi.resources.helper: Select a station resource from the details panel. Canvas resources open the local sticky-note workspace; other resources open guidance, examples, or checklists here.
fi.resources.emptyStation: No resources are directly linked to this station in the selected cycle.
fi.resources.noExternalRenderer: No external canvas renderer is configured, so this page uses the built-in local workspace.
fi.resources.useWithAiHelp: Open Resources, select a canvas or guidance item, then copy its Markdown or JSON into your AI conversation.
fi.ai.helper: Use AI to facilitate the station conversation, work through the selected Resources, and turn canvas notes or resource findings into next actions.
fi.confluence.title: Publishing templates
fi.confluence.helper: Choose the purpose first, then copy the format that matches the destination. Markdown is for docs repositories and static sites. Confluence-wiki is for Confluence pages that accept wiki markup.
fi.confluence.questionTemplateHelp: Use this when you want to gather station answers and evidence with related canvas questions and resources.
fi.confluence.formatGuidanceText: Use Markdown for docs repositories and static sites. Use Confluence-wiki for Confluence pages that accept wiki markup.
fi.data.title: Static integration surfaces
fi.data.helper: These JSON files are published with the site and can be consumed by future MCP tools, documentation generators, or external canvas renderers.
fi.data.panelHelper: All workspace views consume generated JSON under /data. No database or server-side persistence is introduced.
fi.data.localeSafeText: Default locale is {defaultLocale}; published locales are {locales}.
fi.partners.title: Built with the APIOps Cycles community
fi.partners.description: APIOps Cycles is an open method. Partners help develop, use, and teach it with teams around the world.
